module_mood_contract: earned trust — 'the way I work with agents is something my staff engineer and my CISO can sign off on, before I even try anything big'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Pattern-recognition LOs need n>=2 instances with contrast.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Subagent vs main-thread LO satisfied by Ex1+Ex2 (subagent invocations) vs Ex3 (main-thread authoring).
Disclose-weakest-part, one-question-at-a-time, name-a-branch-not-a-rule, invoke-on-feature all live inside registry-expanded prompts (markers at lines 55, 63, 67).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body teaches the work; trainer manages the room.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No pair-share/tell-the-room constructions. Connections (line 24) addresses the individual student.
Line 8: 'Not a typo-fix, not a quarter-long epic.' Lines 75-77: Bring-to-Module-4 floor+ceiling callout.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Per-exercise leap test — three observable Monday outcomes.
Cross-module artefact contracts in maintainer block.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 128-134: ADR + test-strategy SKILL + CLAUDE.local.md rows present.
Lines 136-145: six rows covering Ex1/Ex2/Ex3 forcing functions and Debrief.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Convenience prompts with known shape-bias get body callout.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Sharpen-skill body callout (line 57) names the same-context-window self-audit charity bias and offers harsher alternatives.
Lines 53/55 (sharpen), 61/63 (ready-to-clear), 65/67 (clear-session) — each marker preceded by a one-sentence action lead-in per rule 2.
Maintainer-block mood target (line 90) names 'earned trust' verbatim with risk + diagnostic + fix. Trace mood 8 throughout.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with discipline, not failure mode.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Big Idea opens with 'Before the agent runs bigger work alone, earn your staff engineer's and CISO's trust' — positive discipline.
Subagent primitive introduced here per strategy. plan.md / verifier / three-pattern not named.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 43-47: Theme 4 (self-aware/grain-of-salt), Theme 3 (mirror), Theme 1 (90% correct) all surfaced as bolded breadcrumbs.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Meta-frame lectures are closers; demos go first.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Skills-from-the-frontier (ceiling-showing demo) correctly placed BEFORE exercises.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood lands 8+ at every teaching beat.
Mood doesn't resolve early; M3 must not bleed into M4 curious readiness.
rules_evaluated.evidence: /clear is hard boundary; Bring-to-Module-4 is task-sizing only.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Teaching moment lands across persona variation.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Disclose-weakest-part lives inside the sharpen prompt; speed-runner who skips body still hits it.
Big Idea aligns with strategy doc M3 Big Idea: two curated skills + one authored skill, team-kit accretion seeded.
Bring-to-Module-4 calls 'one or two candidate tasks from your backlog'; matches strategy M4 open.
